subcodes.title: The Universal Love: Words spoken on 1911-10-24 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Message of Krishna is the message of love. All God's prophets have brought the message of love.... The power of the Holy Spirit enlightening man's intelligence has enabled him to discover
subcodes.subjects: @consorting with all; being kind; loving to all, @words vs deeds, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @The Holy Spirit, @love of God, @unity in diversity, @Buddhism and Hinduism; religions of the East, @oneness; unity of religion, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @rejection, opposition and persecution
